title: selinum aquilegiifolium
intro: Selinum aquilegiifolium, also known as Yarrow Burreed, is a flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its volatile oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Selinum aquilegiifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
